judge_reason: Description A details multiple visual elements (stamps, hole-punches, handwritten notes) while Description B explicitly states there are no photographs or visual content, creating a direct contradiction on the presence and categories of visual material.
original_image_tags: A green carbon-copy paper document. At the top, a stamped "SECRET" is crossed out with a single line. In the bottom left, a red circular stamp with "Col Taylor" inside. In the bottom center, a blue stamp with "May Gen. USAF" inside. Handwritten notes in pencil and blue ink are scattered across the page. The paper shows signs of age and has three hole-punch marks on the left.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A scanned typewritten government memorandum cover page with visible stamps, handwritten initials, and a printed coordination table at the bottom; no photograph or illustration.*
